description: Unwrap a previously wrapped L2 account key with the TS-derived L1 root key. Locks the TS-shipped BLAKE2b L1 derivation + XSalsa20-Poly1305 wrap. Rust diverges (HKDF-SHA256 + XChaCha20-Poly1305); see deviations.md.

negativeCases.name: wrong-account-salt
mutations: flip first byte of inputs.accountSaltHex before deriving L1

negativeCases.name: tampered-wrapped-key
mutations: flip first ciphertext byte of inputs.wrappedAccountKeyHex (offset 24)

serverBoundOutputs.name: wrappedAccountKey
serverBoundOutputs.reason: Wrapped L2 account key is stored on the server, opaque under L1.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: password
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: Password never reaches the server in any form.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: l0MasterKey
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: L0 master key is short-lived client memory only.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: l1RootKey
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: L1 root key wraps L2 and never leaves the client.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: accountKey
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: L2 plaintext is the account-wide secret; only the wrapped form is uploaded.
